rules: Valuta l'effetto sulla base di sensazioni visive indirette: apertura, chiarezza, peso, densità dello spazio
Un testo con 'brilliance' o 'gleam' vale più di uno che usa 'bright' direttamente
Distingui sempre se l'effetto è semantico (atmosfera, spazialità) o lessicale (parole dirette)
Un punteggio 5 richiede che il concetto emerga senza parole esatte della lista
prompt_trace: Describe the inside of a building you have never entered.
Write about an object that changes when you look away.
Describe a space that seems to breathe on its own.
Write about the quality of a moment just before something begins.
Describe the feeling of a corridor with no end.
Write about what is visible at the edge of attention.
Describe a surface that is difficult to see clearly.
Write about a space where something is always just out of sight.
Describe the transition between two different kinds of space.
Write about what a room reveals about the person who has left it.
Describe a window and what it does to the space around it.
Write about the difference between two identical rooms at different times of day.
